action_semantics: tanh-normalized [physical thrust offset, roll command, pitch command, yaw command]; negative pitch is forward

action_command_map.collective_offset: thrust_command_center + action[0] * thrust_span_up when action[0] >= 0, else thrust_command_center + action[0] * thrust_span_down
action_command_map.pitch_rate_radps: action[2] * max_pitch_rate_radps; negative pitch is forward

coordinate_contract.training_surrogate: FLU: x=forward along decreasing north, y=east/left convention, z=up
coordinate_contract.gate_normals: inferred from previous horizontal course segment and forced upright

validation.promotion_gate: nominal telemetry only; randomized summaries are context

runtime_notes: Compute the 26 actor features in the exact listed order.
Use the active gate index from race status and clamp the next gate to the final gate.
Use the measured AI-GP gate map and upright inferred gate normals embedded here.
This artifact is for structured simulator state; it is not a camera-only live policy.
Use best_policy.pt, not final_policy.pt; the final checkpoint regressed after the best eval.
